children.label: A
children.text: constructed under this subtitle and acquired within 2 years after the date of completion; or

children.label: B
children.text: constructed in a domestic shipyard on private account and not under this subtitle, and documented under the laws of the United States.

children.label: A
children.text: is of at least 1,350 gross tons;

children.label: B
children.text: the Secretary of Transportation believes should, because of its age, obsolescence, or other reasons, be replaced in the public interest; and

children.label: C
children.text: has been owned by a citizen of the United States for at least 3 years immediately before its acquisition under this chapter.
